lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨੀ ਘਟੀ ਸਹੁ ਵਸੈ ਸਹ ਬਿਨੁ ਘਟੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanee ghattee sahu vasai seh bin ghatt na koe |
lines.english: God the Cosmic Husband dwells within all hearts; without Him, there is no heart at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak te sohaaganee jinaa guramukh paragatt hoe |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are the happy, virtuous soul-brides; the Lord is revealed to them. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੁ ਧਰਿ ਤਲੀ ਗਲੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: sir dhar talee galee meree aau |
lines.english: then step onto My Path with your head in hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਤਉ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਖੇਲਣ ਕਾ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jau tau prem khelan kaa chaau |
lines.english: If you desire to play this game of love with Me,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੈਰੁ ਧਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: eit maarag pair dhareejai |
lines.english: When you place your feet on this Path,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਕਾਣਿ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sir deejai kaan na keejai |20|
lines.english: give Me your head, and do not pay any attention to public opinion. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਲਿ ਕਿਰਾੜਾ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naal kiraarraa dosatee koorrai koorree paae |
lines.english: False is friendship with the false and greedy. False is its foundation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ਮੂਲਿਆ ਆਵੈ ਕਿਤੈ ਥਾਇ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: maran na jaapai mooliaa aavai kitai thaae |21|
lines.english: O Moollah, no one knows where death shall strike. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਹੀਣੰ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: giaan heenan agiaan poojaa |
lines.english: Without spiritual wisdom, the people worship ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਰਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin giaan dharam bin dhiaan |
lines.english: Without the Guru, there is no spiritual wisdom; without Dharma, there is no meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਖੀ ਮੂਲੋ ਨ ਬਾਕੀ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: sach bin saakhee moolo na baakee |23|
lines.english: Without Truth, there is no credit; without capital, there is no balance. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਵਰਤਾਵਾ ਭਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: andh varataavaa bhaau doojaa |22|
lines.english: They grope in the darkness, in the love of duality. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੂ ਘਲੈ ਉਠੀ ਚਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: maanoo ghalai utthee chalai |
lines.english: The mortals are sent into the world; then, they arise and depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਝੁਰੈ ਦਲ ਮੇਲਵੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਲੁ ਅਧਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: raam jhurai dal melavai antar bal adhikaar |
lines.english: Raam Chand, sad at heart, assembled his army and forces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਦੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਇਵੇਹੀ ਗਲੈ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: saad naahee ivehee galai |24|
lines.english: There is no joy in this. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਸੈਨਾ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਜੁਝੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bantar kee sainaa seveeai man tan jujh apaar |
lines.english: The army of monkeys was at his service; his mind and body became eager for war.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਾ ਲੈ ਗਇਆ ਦਹਸਿਰੋ ਲਛਮਣੁ ਮੂਓ ਸਰਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: seetaa lai geaa dahasiro lachhaman mooo saraap |
lines.english: Raawan captured his wife Sita, and Lachhman was cursed to die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਝੂਰੈ ਰਾਮਚੰਦੁ ਸੀਤਾ ਲਛਮਣ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: man meh jhoorai raamachand seetaa lachhaman jog |
lines.english: In his mind, Raam Chand mourned for Sita and Lachhman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਿ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak karataa karanahaar kar vekhai thaap uthaap |25|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator Lord is the Doer of all; He watches over all, and destroys what He has created. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲਾ ਦੈਤੁ ਨ ਸਮਝਈ ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀਏ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolaa dait na samajhee tin prabh kee kaam |
lines.english: The misguided demon did not understand that God is the Doer of deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਣਵੰਤਰੁ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਆਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: hanavantar aaraadhiaa aaeaa kar sanjog |
lines.english: Then, he remembered Hanuman the monkey-god, who came to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਸੋ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਮਿਟਈ ਰਾਮ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak veparavaahu so kirat na mittee raam |26|
lines.english: O Nanak, the actions of the Self-existent Lord cannot be erased. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹੌਰ ਸਹਰੁ ਜਹਰੁ ਕਹਰੁ ਸਵਾ ਪਹਰੁ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: laahauar sehar jehar kehar savaa pehar |27|
lines.english: The city of Lahore suffered terrible destruction for four hours. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹੌਰ ਸਹਰੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਦਾ ਘਰੁ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: laahauar sehar amrit sar sifatee daa ghar |28|
lines.english: The city of Lahore is a pool of ambrosial nectar, the home of praise. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦੋਸੀਅ ਘਰੇ ਹੀ ਵੁਠੀ ਕੁੜਿਈਁ ਰੰਨੀ ਧੰਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: audoseea ghare hee vutthee kurriee ranee dhamee |
lines.english: Prosperity dwells in his home, with the sounds of girls and women.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦੋਸਾਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਨੀਸਾਨੀ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਅੰਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: audosaahai kiaa neesaanee tott na aavai anee |
lines.english: What are the signs of a prosperous person? His stores of food never run out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੀ ਰੰਨੀ ਘਰੇ ਸਿਆਪਾ ਰੋਵਨਿ ਕੂੜੀ ਕੰਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: satee ranee ghare siaapaa rovan koorree kamee |
lines.english: All the women of his home shout and cry over useless things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਲੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਟੇ ਦੰਮ ਸਹੰਮੀ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: jo levai so devai naahee khatte dam sahamee |29|
lines.english: Whatever he takes, he does not give back. Seeking to earn more and more, he is troubled and uneasy. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈ ਦੋਖੜੈ ਸੜਿਓਹਿ ਕਾਲੀ ਹੋਈਆ ਦੇਹੁਰੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਭੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kai dokharrai sarriohi kaalee hoeea dehuree naanak mai tan bhang |
lines.english: What pain has burnt you, and made your body black? O Nanak, my body is battered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਬਰ ਤੂੰ ਹਰੀਆਵਲਾ ਕਵਲਾ ਕੰਚਨ ਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: pabar toon hareeaavalaa kavalaa kanchan van |
lines.english: O lotus, your leaves were green, and your blossoms were gold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਡਿਠੈ ਤਨੁ ਪਰਫੁੜੈ ਚੜੈ ਚਵਗਣਿ ਵੰਨੁ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: jit dditthai tan parafurrai charrai chavagan van |30|
lines.english: Seeing it, my body blossomed forth, and I was blessed with a deep and beautiful color. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਨਾ ਲਹਾਂ ਜੈ ਸੇਤੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaanaa paanee naa lahaan jai setee meraa sang |
lines.english: I have not received that water which I love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਫੈ ਸਰਫੈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਏਵੈ ਗਈ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sarafai sarafai sadaa sadaa evai gee vihaae |
lines.english: Bit by bit, life passes away, even though the mortal tries to hold it back.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜੀਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਹੀ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee jeevai sadaa sadaa suratee hee pat hoe |
lines.english: Only the spiritually wise live forever; they are honored for their intuitive awareness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਜਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਚਲਿਆ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: raj na koee jeeviaa pahuch na chaliaa koe |
lines.english: No one lives long enough to accomplish all he wishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਪੁਛਿਆ ਹੀ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kis no aakheeai vin puchhiaa hee lai jaae |31|
lines.english: O Nanak, unto whom should we complain? Death takes one's life away without anyone's consent. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਦੇਅਹੁ ਰਾਇ ਨੋ ਮਤਿ ਚਲੈ ਜਾਂ ਬੁਢਾ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dos na deahu raae no mat chalai jaan budtaa hovai |
lines.english: Do not blame the Sovereign Lord; when someone grows old, his intellect leaves him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਕਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਘਟਿ ਵਧਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: poore kaa keea sabh kichh pooraa ghatt vadh kichh naahee |
lines.english: All that the Perfect Lord does is perfect; there is not too little, or too much.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲਾਂ ਕਰੇ ਘਣੇਰੀਆ ਤਾਂ ਅੰਨੑੇ ਪਵਣਾ ਖਾਤੀ ਟੋਵੈ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: galaan kare ghanereea taan anae pavanaa khaatee ttovai |32|
lines.english: The blind man talks and babbles, and then falls into the ditch. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਐਸਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਾਂਹਿ ਸਮਾਂਹੀ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh aisaa jaanai poore maanhi samaanhee |33|
lines.english: O Nanak, knowing this as Gurmukh, the mortal merges into the Perfect Lord God. ||33||
